heat_status: North Pacific - Continued high probabilities of MHWs are forecast across the central and western North Pacific (70-100% [30-60%]; low-medium confidence), as well as around Baja California (40-70% [20-50%]; low-medium confidence) for at least the next three months. | Tropical Pacific - Through May 2026, MHW likelihoods are low in the eastern tropical Pacific (0-20% [0-20%]; high confidence), and elevated in the western tropical Pacific only if warming trends are not removed (50-80% [0-20%]; low-medium confidence). Thereafter, increasing MHW chances in the central and eastern equatorial Pacific are consistent with development of El Niño.
north_pacific: Continued high probabilities of MHWs are forecast across the central and western North Pacific (70-100% [30-60%]; low-medium confidence), as well as around Baja California (40-70% [20-50%]; low-medium confidence) for at least the next three months.
tropical_pacific: Through May 2026, MHW likelihoods are low in the eastern tropical Pacific (0-20% [0-20%]; high confidence), and elevated in the western tropical Pacific only if warming trends are not removed (50-80% [0-20%]; low-medium confidence). Thereafter, increasing MHW chances in the central and eastern equatorial Pacific are consistent with development of El Niño.
